id.description: The ID of the ad account (prefixed with act_)

name.description: The name of the ad account

account_status.description: Status of the account. 1 = ACTIVE, 2 = DISABLED, 3 = UNSETTLED, 7 = PENDING_RISK_REVIEW, 8 = PENDING_SETTLEMENT, 9 = IN_GRACE_PERIOD, 100 = PENDING_CLOSURE, 101 = CLOSED.

currency.description: Currency code used by the account (ISO 4217)

timezone_name.description: Timezone name for the ad account

amount_spent.description: Total amount spent by the account in account currency

business.description: The business associated with this ad account
